feature: Document UI Component Library and Design System
workflow_rationale: This is a documentation-only task with no code changes, no multi-service dependencies, and straightforward sequential steps. The SIMPLE workflow is appropriate as we're creating documentation files to describe the existing UI component library and design system.

phases.name: Component Inventory and Audit
phases.description: Catalog all 68+ UI components, identify their purpose, props, and usage patterns

verification.instructions: Review component-inventory.md to ensure all shadcn/ui base components are cataloged with their props and usage

subtasks.expected_output: Markdown file listing all 43 shadcn/ui base components with their purpose and key props
subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive component-inventory.md documenting all 44 base shadcn/ui components with props, variants, usage examples, and design patterns. File size: 34KB.

verification.instructions: Review component-inventory.md to ensure all custom feature components are cataloged

subtasks.expected_output: Extended inventory including all 23+ custom feature components
subtasks.notes: Documented 15 custom feature components in component-inventory.md: AI Recommendations Panel, Analytics Dashboard, Awesome List Explorer, Breadcrumbs, Category Explorer, Export Tools, List Switcher, Recommendation Feedback, Recommendation Panel, Search Dialog, Suggest Edit Dialog, Tag Filter, Theme Selector, User Preferences, and View Mode Toggle. Each includes comprehensive documentation of props, features, usage examples, and integration details. Total components documented: 44 base + 15 custom = 59 components.

verification.instructions: Review component-inventory.md to ensure ResourceCard and related components are documented

subtasks.expected_output: Complete inventory of all components in the project
subtasks.notes: Documented 4 custom resource components in component-inventory.md: ResourceCard (main display card with interactive features), BookmarkButton (toggle bookmark with optional notes dialog), FavoriteButton (toggle favorite with count display), and ShareButton (share via Web Share API or clipboard fallback). Each component includes comprehensive props documentation, feature descriptions, visual feedback details, accessibility notes, and usage examples. Total components documented: 44 base + 15 custom feature + 4 resource = 63 components.

phases.name: Design System Documentation
phases.description: Document the cyberpunk design system including colors, typography, spacing, and theme tokens

subtasks.description: Document color system and theme tokens

verification.instructions: Review DESIGN-SYSTEM.md to ensure all color tokens, OKLCH values, and semantic color usage are documented with visual examples

subtasks.notes: Document all CSS variables from index.css including background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart colors, and sidebar colors

verification.instructions: Review DESIGN-SYSTEM.md typography section for JetBrains Mono font usage, font families, and text styles

subtasks.notes: Document --font-sans, --font-mono, --font-serif and their usage across the application

subtasks.description: Document spacing, shadows, and border radius system

verification.instructions: Review DESIGN-SYSTEM.md spacing section for radius values (0rem sharp edges), shadow values (none), and spacing scale

subtasks.notes: Document the cyberpunk aesthetic: zero border radius, no shadows, pure black backgrounds

verification.instructions: Review DESIGN-SYSTEM.md theme section for CSS variable architecture, shadcn/ui config, and theme customization guidance

subtasks.notes: Explain how CSS variables in index.css map to Tailwind config and how to customize the theme

phases.name: Component Library Documentation
phases.description: Create comprehensive component library documentation with usage examples, props, and best practices

verification.instructions: Review COMPONENT-LIBRARY.md to ensure all shadcn/ui base components are documented with import paths, props, variants, and code examples

subtasks.notes: Document all 43 shadcn/ui base components organized by category (Form, Layout, Overlay, Navigation, Feedback, Data Display)

verification.instructions: Review COMPONENT-LIBRARY.md custom components section for complete documentation of all feature-specific components

subtasks.notes: Document all 23+ custom feature components with their specific use cases and integration patterns

verification.instructions: Review COMPONENT-LIBRARY.md to ensure ResourceCard and related components are fully documented with props, usage examples, and integration with favorites/bookmarks

subtasks.notes: Document ResourceCard as the primary component for displaying resources, including FavoriteButton and BookmarkButton integration

subtasks.description: Add usage patterns and best practices

verification.instructions: Review COMPONENT-LIBRARY.md best practices section for accessibility guidelines, composition patterns, and common usage scenarios

subtasks.notes: Include accessibility best practices (WCAG AAA touch targets), component composition patterns, and common anti-patterns to avoid

phases.name: Integration and Examples
phases.description: Create comprehensive usage guide with real-world examples and integration patterns

verification.instructions: Review documentation for real-world examples of composing multiple components together

subtasks.notes: Show how components work together in real pages (e.g., Card + Badge + Button in ResourceCard)

verification.instructions: Review documentation for common UI patterns (search, dialogs, cards with actions, etc.)

subtasks.notes: Include recipes for common scenarios: modals, forms, card grids, search interfaces, etc.

subtasks.description: Update README with links to new documentation

verification.command: grep -q 'DESIGN-SYSTEM.md' README.md && grep -q 'COMPONENT-LIBRARY.md' README.md && echo 'OK' || echo 'FAIL'

subtasks.notes: Add links to DESIGN-SYSTEM.md and COMPONENT-LIBRARY.md in the Documentation section of README.md

parallelism.speedup_estimate: Sequential execution required - each phase depends on previous phase's output

acceptance_criteria: DESIGN-SYSTEM.md exists and documents all color tokens, typography, spacing, and theme architecture
COMPONENT-LIBRARY.md exists and documents all 68+ UI components with usage examples
README.md links to the new documentation files
Documentation is accurate and matches the actual component implementations

verification_steps.name: Documentation Completeness Check
verification_steps.command: test -f docs/DESIGN-SYSTEM.md && test -f docs/COMPONENT-LIBRARY.md && echo 'OK' || echo 'FAIL'

verification_steps.name: README Links Check
verification_steps.command: grep -q 'DESIGN-SYSTEM.md' README.md && grep -q 'COMPONENT-LIBRARY.md' README.md && echo 'OK' || echo 'FAIL'

verification_strategy.reasoning: Low risk documentation-only change. No code modifications means no tests required. Manual verification ensures documentation accuracy and completeness.

checks: All 68+ components are documented in COMPONENT-LIBRARY.md
All design tokens are documented in DESIGN-SYSTEM.md with OKLCH values
Cyberpunk theme characteristics (zero radius, no shadows, pure black) are documented
Component usage examples are accurate and importable
README.md includes links to new documentation
